nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Invoice Payload
nodes.notes: Receives the full invoice payload from the Next.js API route

nodes.name: Prepare template variables
nodes.notes: Builds all template variables for DOCX placeholders

nodes.name: Fetch DOCX template from Drive
nodes.notes: Downloads the invoice template DOCX from Google Drive. Replace REPLACE_WITH_GOOGLE_DOC_TEMPLATE_ID with the actual Google Doc ID of your invoice template.

nodes.name: Note: PDF generation
nodes.notes: See the /api/generate-pdf route for actual PDF generation logic

nodes.name: Call /api/generate-pdf
nodes.notes: Calls the Next.js API route that generates the PDF from the DOCX template

nodes.name: Upload PDF to Google Drive
nodes.notes: Uploads the generated PDF to the configured Google Drive folder

nodes.name: Send email with PDF
nodes.notes: Sends the invoice email to the recipient with PDF attached

nodes.name: Respond to webhook
nodes.notes: Returns the Drive file ID and URL to the Next.js app

_SETUP_NOTES.1_webhook: After importing, copy the Production webhook URL and set it as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL in Vercel env vars
_SETUP_NOTES.2_gdrive_credentials: Create a Google Drive OAuth2 credential in n8n with access to the invoices folder
_SETUP_NOTES.3_gmail_credentials: Create a Gmail OAuth2 credential in n8n for contact@skippair.com
_SETUP_NOTES.4_pdf_generation: The /api/generate-pdf Next.js route fills the DOCX template and converts it to PDF. See src/app/api/generate-pdf/route.ts
_SETUP_NOTES.5_template: Upload the CMSEA_Invoice_-_template.docx to Google Drive, convert it to Google Doc, and replace the template ID in the 'Fetch DOCX template' node
_SETUP_NOTES.6_variables: All {{PLACEHOLDER}} variables in the DOCX template must match the keys in the 'Prepare template variables' node
